title: Wind-Turbine Support Tower: Minimum-Mass Lattice Member Sizing under Thrust and Sway Limits
strategies: uniform sizing: one cross-section for every lattice member, just large enough to pass the stress and top-sway limits (baseline)
one-shot per-member stress sizing from a single reference FEM solve, then uniform stiffening to meet the top-sway limit
sensitivity / virtual-work sizing: allocate stiffness where it cuts top sway per kilogram most (A_i ~ sqrt(|N_i n_i|)), combined with the fully-stressed design
cheapest-possible min-area design (infeasible: over-stressed and over-swaying -> scores 0)
